title: Flea Treatment in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn | $350 – $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for fast relief!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Bay Ridge home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Bay Ridge, Brooklyn, with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on the size of your property. Our experienced technicians use safe, effective methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages and protect your family and pets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bay Ridge residents for years with proven flea elimination techniques and outstanding customer service. We understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn homes and apartments, and we offer same-day service, eco-friendly treatment options, and a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Bay Ridge's mix of historic brownstones, co-op buildings, and single-family homes along tree-lined streets like Shore Road and Colonial Road can all be vulnerable to flea infestations, especially in pet-friendly households. From apartments near the Verrazano Bridge to homes in the quiet residential blocks off Third and Fifth Avenues, our team provides targeted flea treatments that work for Bay Ridge's diverse housing stock.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Bay Ridge?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Bay Ridge typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment, the severity of the infestation, and the number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. However, because flea eggs can continue to hatch for up to two weeks, we recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure complete elimination of all life stages.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, and we provide detailed safety instructions after every treatment.

faqs.question: Do you service apartment buildings in Bay Ridge?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We regularly service apartments, co-ops, and condos throughout Bay Ridge. We work efficiently and discreetly, and we can coordinate with building management if needed to ensure the most effective treatment for multi-unit buildings.
